name: hud_ui_background_container_set_enabled
description: HudUiBackgroundContainer::SetEnabled stores the enabled value in the embedded HudUiContainer state.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is covered by the existing hud_ui_p0_leaves VC target but was not rerun for this functional marker update.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x42ee40 validates loading the stack argument and storing it to self+4, the embedded container enabled field.
The native smoke calls SetEnabled(1) and SetEnabled(0) on a constructed background container and validates the stored enabled state.
